title: OIDC Logout Override
description: Routes Foundry's Log Out button through the OIDC shim's /oidc/logout endpoint, so a click ends both the Foundry session and the IdP (Keycloak) SSO session in one step. Without this module the button just navigates to /join, which the shim's auto-redirect would re-authenticate immediately via the still-live IdP session.
